desc_ar: إنجليزي بسيط عن التسويق: الإعلان، العلامة، والزبائن، والبيع على الإنترنت.
why_ar: لتتعلّم كلمات الإنجليزي التي تصف كيف تصل الشركات إلى زبائنها وتبيع منتجاتها.
outcomes: تتعلّم كلمات: advert, brand, customer, product
تستخدم المضارع المستمر لوصف ما يحدث الآن
warmup: هل اشتريت شيئاً من الإنترنت من قبل؟

grammar.explain_ar: نستخدم المضارع المستمر لشيء يحدث الآن، في هذه اللحظة. الصيغة: am/is/are + الفعل+ing. نستخدم am مع I، و is مع he/she/it، و are مع you/we/they.
grammar.explain_en_html:
Present Continuous

We use it for actions happening now: am/is/are + verb-ing.

I am working. He/She/It is working. You/We/They are working.

The company is launching a new product.
Customers are buying the new phone today.

examples.sentence: The team is planning a new advert.
Customers are buying the new product.
I am writing the words for the advert now.
The shop is selling shoes online this week.
examples.translation_ar: المحل يبيع أحذية على الإنترنت هذا الأسبوع.

mistakes.explanation_ar: نحتاج is قبل الفعل+ing. لا نحذف فعل be.
مع الجمع (customers) نستخدم are، وليس is.
بعد is نضيف ing إلى الفعل: work → working.

items.question: The company ___ a new advert now.
items.explanation_ar: حدث الآن، والفاعل مفرد: is + making.

items.question: He ___ to a customer right now.

readings.label: A
paragraphs: Omar works in a small *company*. The company sells nice bags. Omar wants more *customers*, so this week the team is making a new *advert*. They want people on the internet to see it. Omar is choosing the pictures. His friend Sara is writing the words. "Our bags are strong and cheap," she says. "Customers will love them."

The team wants the *brand* to look friendly. They pick a soft blue color and a small, happy logo. Omar is happy because the *product* looks good in the pictures. "A good advert helps people trust our *brand*," he says. Tomorrow they will put the advert *online*. Omar hopes many customers will *buy* the bags and tell their friends. He knows a small company can *grow* with a good advert. Good words and nice pictures bring new customers every day.

choices: A team is making a new advert for their bags
A man is buying a new car
A family trip to the sea
questions.correct_answer: A team is making a new advert for their bags
questions.explanation_ar: النص عن فريق يصنع إعلاناً جديداً لحقائبهم.
قال النص إن الشركة تبيع حقائب.

questions.question_en: Who is writing the words for the advert?

questions.explanation_ar: الزبائن هم الناس الذين يشترون الأشياء.

choices: Because the product looks good in the pictures
questions.correct_answer: Because the product looks good in the pictures
questions.explanation_ar: عمر سعيد لأن المنتج يبدو جيداً في الصور.

questions.question_en: What does the team hope will happen?
choices: Many customers will buy the bags
questions.correct_answer: Many customers will buy the bags
questions.explanation_ar: يأمل الفريق أن يشتري كثير من الزبائن الحقائب.

questions.question_en: When will the team put the advert online?
questions.question_ar: متى سيضع الفريق الإعلان على الإنترنت؟
questions.explanation_ar: قال عمر إنهم سيضعون الإعلان على الإنترنت غداً.

vocab: a group of people who work and sell something
Omar works in a small company.
a message that helps sell something
They are making a new advert.
the name and look of a company's product
a thing a company makes and sells
They will put the advert online.
to pay money to get something
a small picture or sign for a brand
The company has a happy logo.

readings.label: B
paragraphs: Layla has a small *shop*. She sells nice cups and plates. Last year, only people from her town came to the shop. Now Layla is *selling* her cups *online* too. "More *customers* can find me now," she says. Every morning she takes photos of the cups. She writes a short *advert* for each one. She puts a good *price* under every photo.

Today Layla is busy. Two customers are *sending* messages. One customer wants three blue cups. Another wants a big plate. Layla is *packing* the cups in a box now. She is happy because her small *business* is growing fast this year. "The internet helps me *reach* new customers," she says. "People from other cities buy my cups. A good photo and a fair *price* bring more customers every week."

questions.question_en: What is the passage mainly about?
choices: A woman selling her cups online
questions.correct_answer: A woman selling her cups online
questions.explanation_ar: النص عن امرأة تبيع أكوابها على الإنترنت.

questions.question_en: What does Layla put under every photo?
questions.question_ar: ماذا تضع ليلى تحت كل صورة؟
questions.explanation_ar: تضع ليلى سعراً جيداً تحت كل صورة.

questions.question_en: What does the word "business" mean here?
choices: A shop or company that sells things
questions.correct_answer: A shop or company that sells things
questions.explanation_ar: الـ business هنا محل أو شركة تبيع أشياء.

choices: Because her small business is growing
questions.correct_answer: Because her small business is growing
questions.explanation_ar: ليلى سعيدة لأن عملها الصغير ينمو.

questions.question_en: How does selling online help Layla?
questions.question_ar: كيف يساعد البيعُ على الإنترنت ليلى؟
choices: It brings customers from other cities
questions.correct_answer: It brings customers from other cities
questions.explanation_ar: البيع على الإنترنت يجلب زبائن من مدن أخرى.

choices: She is packing the cups in a box
She is closing her shop for a year
questions.correct_answer: She is packing the cups in a box
questions.explanation_ar: ليلى تضع الأكواب في صندوق الآن.

vocab: a small place where people buy things
She is selling her cups online.
She puts a good price under every photo.
a shop or company that sells things
to make something go to someone
to put things in a box to send
She is packing the cups in a box.
The internet helps me reach new customers.
a short note you send to someone
good and honest, not too high
A fair price brings more customers.

listening.transcript: Hi, I'm Sami. I work in a small company. This week we are making a new advert for the internet. We want more customers to know our products. My job is to choose the pictures and the words. Today I am writing a short message about our new bag. I love my work because every day is different.

exercises.explanation_ar: قال سامي إنه يعمل في شركة صغيرة.

exercises.question_en: What is the team making this week?

options: To choose the pictures and the words
exercises.explanation_ar: عمل سامي هو اختيار الصور والكلمات.

exercises.question_en: Why does Sami love his work?
exercises.explanation_ar: يحب سامي عمله لأن كل يوم مختلف.

exercises.question_en: What is Sami writing about today?
exercises.explanation_ar: يكتب سامي اليوم رسالة قصيرة عن الحقيبة الجديدة.

writing.prompt_en: Write a short advert for a small shop. What does it sell? Why should customers come? Use the present continuous (for example: We are selling...).
writing.prompt_ar: اكتب إعلاناً قصيراً لمحل صغير. ماذا يبيع؟ لماذا يأتي الزبائن؟ استخدم المضارع المستمر (مثال: We are selling...).

speaking.title_en: Talk about an advert you like
speaking.prompt_en: Talk about an advert you like. What is it for? Why do you like it? Say what the company is selling.
speaking.prompt_ar: تحدث عن إعلان يعجبك. لأي شيء هو؟ لماذا يعجبك؟ قل ماذا تبيع الشركة.
prep: حضّر كلمات: advert, product, customer, brand
رتّب: ما هو الإعلان، ولماذا يعجبك
